design_system.name: Nitto Legacy: Industrial Steel
design_system.description: A spiritual successor to Nitto 1320 Legends, featuring a heavy industrial aesthetic, brushed metal textures, chrome accents, and a deep navy automotive color palette.

scale.label: text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-slate-400

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#334155] to-[#1E293B] hover:from-[#475569] hover:to-[#334155] text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 border-t border-white/20 border-b-4 border-black/50 active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#475569] hover:border-[#94A3B8] text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-white font-bold py-2 px-6 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.danger: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#EF4444] to-[#991B1B] text-white border-t border-white/20 border-b-4 border-black/50 active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.nav_tab: px-6 py-3 bg-[#0F172A] border-r border-[#1E293B] text-[#64748B] hover:text-[#FFB300] hover:bg-[#1E293B] transition-colors uppercase font-bold tracking-wider skew-x-[-15deg] data-[state=active]:bg-[#1E293B] data-[state=active]:text-[#FFB300] data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-b-[#FFB300]

cards.car_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#1A2332] border border-[#2D3748] hover:border-[#FFB300] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm shadow-lg
cards.part_card: bg-[#0F172A] border border-[#1E293B] p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 hover:bg-[#1E293B] transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.standard: bg-[#0B0F19] border border-[#2D3748] text-white p-3 focus:border-[#FFB300] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFB300] outline-none rounded-sm font-mono placeholder:text-slate-600

textures.carbon_fiber: radial-gradient(black 15%, transparent 16%) 0 0, radial-gradient(black 15%, transparent 16%) 8px 8px, radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.1) 15%, transparent 20%) 0 1px, radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.1) 15%, transparent 20%) 8px 9px
textures.grid: linear-gradient(to right, #1E293B 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #1E293B 1px, transparent 1px)

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1_setup: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new color palette (Midnight Navy, Steel Blue, Amber, Red). Ensure fonts 'Chakra Petch' and 'Barlow' are properly loaded.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2_global_styles: Refactor App.css to replace the 'Neon Green' theme with the 'Industrial Steel' theme. Use the texture images as subtle background overlays.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3_navigation: Rebuild the Main Navigation bar using the skew-transform 'tab' style found in early 2000s racing games. It should be a horizontal bar with angled separators.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4_components: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Dialog) to remove the default 'clean' look and add borders, bevels, and industrial shadows. Cards should have 'bolted' corners (use pseudo-elements).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5_pages: Redesign Main Menu, Garage, and Race Screen using the layout strategies. The Race Screen must integrate the canvas element seamlessly into a 'dashboard' view.
instructions_to_main_agent.critical_visuals: Do NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to rounded-sm or chamfered edges. Use gradients for buttons to give them volume (pseudo-3D).

universal_guidelines: Always provide a 'data-testid' for every interactive element.
Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards, especially on dark steel backgrounds.
Use 'Chakra Petch' for all headers and numeric data. Use 'Barlow' for body text.
Do not use solid black (#000000); use Deep Midnight Navy (#0B0F19) for 'black' areas.
Buttons must have a 'pressed' state using 'active:translate-y-1' and border adjustments.
Images should be treated with a slight desaturation filter or blue tint to match the cold industrial vibe, unless they are active/highlighted.
All containers must have generous padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid cramping.
Use grid layouts (bento-style) for Garage and Shop views.
